name: gcloud
description: Google Cloud CLI — authenticated access to GCP services

entrypointCommands: if [ -f /secrets/gcp-service-account.json ]; then gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file=/secrets/gcp-service-account.json --quiet 2>&1 >&2 || true; PROJECT_ID=$(grep -o '"project_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' /secrets/gcp-service-account.json | head -1 | sed 's/.*"project_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); [ -n "$PROJECT_ID" ] && gcloud config set project "$PROJECT_ID" --quiet 2>&1 >&2 || true; fi

setupInstructions: Create a GCP service account with the roles you need (e.g. Logs Viewer, Cloud Functions Viewer) and download the JSON key to ~/.config/nanoclaw/gcp-service-account.json
